tracks.rawText: 2:08Untitledv5Upbeat indie surf rock track characterized by a bright, clean electric guitar melody with heavy spring reverb and a slight tremolo effect, The song features a driving 4/4 drum beat with a prominent snare on the backbeat and a steady eighth-note hi-hat pattern, A melodic, walking bassline provides a warm low-end foundation, The tempo is approximately 140 BPM in the key of G major, The production is crisp and vintage-inspired, emphasizing a live band feel with minimal processing beyond spatial effects on the lead guitar, The structure consists of a catchy instrumental hook followed by a rhythmic verse sectionPublishRemix
tracks.title: Untitled

tracks.rawText: 4:07MNDR - Feed Me Diamonds (Oliver Nelson Remix) (Cover Art) [2TtqzK7pLqk]v5CoverPulsing sidechained synths drive a powerful four-on-the-floor beat, underpinned by deep, punchy bass, The verse uses filtered arpeggios and syncopated percussive layers for tension, The drop features aggressive saw leads, crisp claps, and intricate fills, building relentless energy2PublishRemix
